# Codebase Report: gooffgrid Flutter Project
Generated: 2026-04-01

Summary: gooffgrid is a Flutter screen-time gamification app where users compete by tracking phone usage. Riverpod state, go_router navigation, Supabase backend, platform channel for device screen time. Currently running in demo mode (auth bypassed). Most data is hardcoded mock. Only stories, O2 economy, screen-time sync talk to real Supabase.
